sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ نَادِيَةُ تُحِبُّ الْغِنَاءَ مُنْذُ صِغَرِهَا.
sentences.translation: Nadija je voljela pjevanje od malih nogu.
sentences.translationEn: Nadia loved singing since she was young.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تُغَنِّي فِي الْبَيْتِ وَفِي الطَّرِيقِ إِلَى الْمَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pjevala je kod kuće i na putu do škole.
sentences.translationEn: She used to sing at home and on the way to school.

sentences.arabic: الْتَحَقَتْ بِمَدْرَسَةِ الْمُوسِيقَى وَتَعَلَّمَتِ الْغِنَاءَ الصَّحِيحَ.
sentences.translation: Pridružila se muzičkoj školi i naučila pravilno pjevati.
sentences.translationEn: She joined the music school and learned to sing properly.

sentences.arabic: غَنَّتْ أَمَامَ النَّاسِ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ وَصَفَّقَ لَهَا الْجَمِيعُ.
sentences.translation: Pjevala je pred ljudima po prvi put i svi su je pozdravili pljeskom.
sentences.translationEn: She sang in front of people for the first time and everyone applauded.
